response_text:
To find the total duration of the caroling, you can calculate the time for each song and then add them together:

1.  **"Deck the Halls" (twice):** $150 \text{ seconds} \times 2 = 300 \text{ seconds}$
2.  **"Jingle Bells" (once):** $240 \text{ seconds} \times 1 = 240 \text{ seconds}$
3.  **Total time:** $300 + 240 = 540 \text{ seconds}$

To make this easier to read, you can convert the seconds into minutes:
$540 \div 60 = 9 \text{ minutes}$

The choir will be caroling for **9 minutes**.
